badge: This hunt is not yet prepared
title: This quarter of Yharnam remains uncharted.
lead: The hunter sharpens their saw cleaver still, preparing a grander chronicle of hunts past. Gehrman has not yet given his blessing, but the workshop echoes with the sound of preparation.
status.title: Workshop Progress
pillar.roadmap.title: The Hunter's Journal
pillar.roadmap.description: A clearer record of the hunt is being compiled, marking the true turning points, the beasts felled, and the blood echoes gathered.
pillar.craft.title: A Finer Workshop Display
pillar.craft.description: The page shall emerge with stronger presence, cleaner trick weapon interactions, and a mobile rendering the Doll herself would admire.
pillar.launch.title: The Bell Tolls Soon
pillar.launch.description: The workshop nears readiness. Until then, review your hunts undertaken or return to the Hunter's Dream.
